commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Now therefore the sword shall never depart from your house; because you have despised me, and have taken the wife of Uriah the Hittite to be your wife. What a dismal scene opens itself to our view during the remaining part of David's reign. (Haydock) Scarcely one of his successors was free from war; even Solomon was disturbed by the rebellion of Jeroboam, and many of David's family and descendants came to an untimely end, ver. (Calmet) Six sons of Josaphat, all Joram's, except one, Josias, the children of Sedecias, 4 Kings xxv. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
